## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Rapyd and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, performance, and optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/SJJJ_ax-KUjGzPDyXkGqiiCSqzHmE3Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [XML generation workflow in Aeroops now includes Rapyd's point of view for articles](https://fathom.video/share/SJJJ_ax-KUjGzPDyXkGqiiCSqzHmE3Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)
  - [Need to shift focus from local payment methods to local card acquiring in content](https://fathom.video/share/SJJJ_ax-KUjGzPDyXkGqiiCSqzHmE3Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [CTAs on blog posts to be optimized and programmatically inserted based on topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/SJJJ_ax-KUjGzPDyXkGqiiCSqzHmE3Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
  - [Swift Alternatives blog performing well; opportunity to create targeted landing page](https://fathom.video/share/SJJJ_ax-KUjGzPDyXkGqiiCSqzHmE3Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [Exploring strategies to optimize content for AI/LLM consumption and visibility](https://fathom.video/share/SJJJ_ax-KUjGzPDyXkGqiiCSqzHmE3Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)

## Topics

### Content Generation Workflow

  - [XML generation step added in Aeroops after image creation](https://fathom.video/share/SJJJ_ax-KUjGzPDyXkGqiiCSqzHmE3Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
  - [Polishing instructions now include Rapyd's point of view for articles](https://fathom.video/share/SJJJ_ax-KUjGzPDyXkGqiiCSqzHmE3Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [Weekly batch of XML files to be provided for Rapyd's ingestion](https://fathom.video/share/SJJJ_ax-KUjGzPDyXkGqiiCSqzHmE3Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)

### Content Focus Adjustment

  - [Pivot from local payment methods to local card acquiring, especially for Europe/UK markets](https://fathom.video/share/SJJJ_ax-KUjGzPDyXkGqiiCSqzHmE3Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Reduce mentions of markets Rapyd no longer serves (e.g., India, China)](https://fathom.video/share/SJJJ_ax-KUjGzPDyXkGqiiCSqzHmE3Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Emphasize benefits of local card acquiring: lower fraud rates, higher approval rates](https://fathom.video/share/SJJJ_ax-KUjGzPDyXkGqiiCSqzHmE3Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)

### Blog Performance

  - [9 articles published so far, with 14 clicks per week (Week 17)](https://fathom.video/share/SJJJ_ax-KUjGzPDyXkGqiiCSqzHmE3Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [Swift Alternative blog performing well with 2% click-through rate](https://fathom.video/share/SJJJ_ax-KUjGzPDyXkGqiiCSqzHmE3Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [GA4 reporting issues persisting; Mark to investigate and potentially reconnect property](https://fathom.video/share/SJJJ_ax-KUjGzPDyXkGqiiCSqzHmE3Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)

### CTA Optimization

  - [Plan to add more product-focused CTAs within blog text](https://fathom.video/share/SJJJ_ax-KUjGzPDyXkGqiiCSqzHmE3Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
  - [Programmatically insert 2-3 CTAs per blog based on topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/SJJJ_ax-KUjGzPDyXkGqiiCSqzHmE3Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=752.0)
  - [Consider creating specific landing pages for high-performing articles (e.g., Swift Alternatives)](https://fathom.video/share/SJJJ_ax-KUjGzPDyXkGqiiCSqzHmE3Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Nicolette to map existing CTAs to topic clusters and create short/medium/long versions](https://fathom.video/share/SJJJ_ax-KUjGzPDyXkGqiiCSqzHmE3Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1499.0)

### AI/LLM Optimization

  - [Focus on getting Rapyd mentioned in various contexts across the web](https://fathom.video/share/SJJJ_ax-KUjGzPDyXkGqiiCSqzHmE3Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)
  - [Target long-tail, nuanced searches in content creation](https://fathom.video/share/SJJJ_ax-KUjGzPDyXkGqiiCSqzHmE3Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1802.0)
  - [Ensure clear, transparent product messaging on website and landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/SJJJ_ax-KUjGzPDyXkGqiiCSqzHmE3Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
  - [Maintain foundational SEO practices while expanding presence on external platforms](https://fathom.video/share/SJJJ_ax-KUjGzPDyXkGqiiCSqzHmE3Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1962.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mark to review Swift Alternatives blog for targeted CTA and landing page opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/SJJJ_ax-KUjGzPDyXkGqiiCSqzHmE3Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Nicolette to create CTA mapping for topic clusters and develop multiple versions (short/medium/long)](https://fathom.video/share/SJJJ_ax-KUjGzPDyXkGqiiCSqzHmE3Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1499.0)
  - [Aida to add "Reviewed" status option in Airtable for easier tracking](https://fathom.video/share/SJJJ_ax-KUjGzPDyXkGqiiCSqzHmE3Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
  - [Team to continue exploring and implementing AI/LLM optimization strategies](https://fathom.video/share/SJJJ_ax-KUjGzPDyXkGqiiCSqzHmE3Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)
  - [Mark to investigate GA4 reporting issues and reconnect property if necessary](https://fathom.video/share/SJJJ_ax-KUjGzPDyXkGqiiCSqzHmE3Yo?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
